name: card-match-pk
description: Static web app for comparing dining card offers in Pakistan.

scripts.dev: npm run build:assets && wrangler pages dev . --port 8002
scripts.build:assets: esbuild assets/algorithms.js assets/app.js assets/chat.js assets/content-pages.js assets/ga-init.js assets/quiz.js assets/sentry-init.js assets/state.js assets/components.css assets/styles.css --minify --sourcemap --outdir=assets/dist --log-level=warning
scripts.watch:assets: esbuild assets/algorithms.js assets/app.js assets/chat.js assets/content-pages.js assets/ga-init.js assets/quiz.js assets/sentry-init.js assets/state.js assets/components.css assets/styles.css --minify --sourcemap --outdir=assets/dist --watch --log-level=info
scripts.refresh:all: npm run refresh:offers && npm run refresh:requirements && npm run generate:seo
